heading: Continuing authority programs

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall implement a program, in accordance with this subsection, for carrying out a project under a continuing authority program for an economically disadvantaged community.December 27, 2020

children.label: A
children.text: solicit project proposals from non-Federal interests by posting program information on a public-facing website and reaching out to non-Federal interests that have previously submitted relevant project proposals to the Secretary; and

children.label: B
children.text: review such proposals and select projects, taking into consideration geographic diversity among the selected projects.

children.heading: Cost share
children.label: 3 Cost share
children.text: Notwithstanding the cost share authorized for the applicable continuing authority program, the Federal share of the cost of a project selected under paragraph (2) shall be 100 percent.

children.heading: Continuing authority program defined
children.label: 4 Continuing authority program defined
children.text: In this subsection, the term “continuing authority program” has the meaning given that term in .section 2282d(c)(1)(D) of this title

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: 5 Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There is authorized to be appropriated to carry out this subsection $150,000,000 for each fiscal year.

children.heading: Emergency streambank and shoreline protection
children.label: 1 Emergency streambank and shoreline protection
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $25,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 701r of this title

children.heading: Storm and hurricane restoration and impact minimization program
children.label: 2 Storm and hurricane restoration and impact minimization program
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $38,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 426g(c) of this title

children.heading: Small river and harbor improvement projects
children.label: 3 Small river and harbor improvement projects
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $63,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 577(a) of this title

children.heading: Regional sediment management
children.label: 4 Regional sediment management
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $63,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 2326(g) of this title

children.heading: Small flood control projects
children.label: 5 Small flood control projects
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $69,250,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 701s of this title

children.heading: Aquatic ecosystem restoration
children.label: 6 Aquatic ecosystem restoration
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $63,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 2330(f) of this title

children.heading: Removal of obstructions; clearing channels
children.label: 7 Removal of obstructions; clearing channels
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $8,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 701g of this title

children.heading: Project modifications for improvement of environment
children.label: 8 Project modifications for improvement of environment
children.text: Notwithstanding , there is authorized to be appropriated to carry out such section $50,500,000 for each of fiscal years 2021 through 2024.section 2309a(h) of this title
